creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jilles
 Date: Wed Aug 14 19:34:13 2013
 New Revision: 254335
 URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/base/254335
 
 Log:
   sh: Allow a lone redirection before '|', ';;' or ';&'.
   
   Example: </dev/null | :
   
   PR:		181240
   MFC after:	1 week
 
 Added:
   head/tools/regression/bin/sh/parser/only-redir2.0   (contents, props changed)
   head/tools/regression/bin/sh/parser/only-redir3.0   (contents, props changed)
   head/tools/regression/bin/sh/parser/only-redir4.0   (contents, props changed)
 Modified:
   head/bin/sh/parser.c
 
 Modified: head/bin/sh/parser.c
 ==============================================================================
 --- head/bin/sh/parser.c	Wed Aug 14 19:16:37 2013	(r254334)
 +++ head/bin/sh/parser.c	Wed Aug 14 19:34:13 2013	(r254335)
 @@ -577,6 +577,9 @@ TRACE(("expecting DO got %s %s\n", tokna
  	case TSEMI:
  	case TAND:
  	case TOR:
 +	case TPIPE:
 +	case TENDCASE:
 +	case TFALLTHRU:
  		/*
  		 * An empty command before a ; doesn't make much sense, and
  		 * should certainly be disallowed in the case of `if ;'.
 
 Added: head/tools/regression/bin/sh/parser/only-redir2.0
 ==============================================================================
 --- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
 +++ head/tools/regression/bin/sh/parser/only-redir2.0	Wed Aug 14 19:34:13 2013	(r254335)
 @@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
 +# $FreeBSD$
 +</dev/null | :
 
 Added: head/tools/regression/bin/sh/parser/only-redir3.0
 ==============================================================================
 --- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
 +++ head/tools/regression/bin/sh/parser/only-redir3.0	Wed Aug 14 19:34:13 2013	(r254335)
 @@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
 +# $FreeBSD$
 +case x in x) </dev/null ;; esac
 
 Added: head/tools/regression/bin/sh/parser/only-redir4.0
 ==============================================================================
 --- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
 +++ head/tools/regression/bin/sh/parser/only-redir4.0	Wed Aug 14 19:34:13 2013	(r254335)
 @@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
 +# $FreeBSD$
 +case x in x) </dev/null ;& esac
 _______________________________________________
